MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-19-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DAVID CASEY'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND DISMISS OR STAY PROCEEDINGS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE CASE IS STAYED PENDING THE COMPLETION OF THE ARBITRATION. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

calendar.matters:
Defendant David Casey'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Or Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Feb-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DAVID CASEY'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Or Stay Proceedings is granted. No opposition filed. The case is stayed pending the completion of the arbitration. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
